xsl:output.cdata-section-elements: g:id title description g:google_product_category g:product_type link g:display_ads_link g:mobile_link g:image_link g:additional_image_link g:availability g:price g:sale_price g:gtin g:mpn g:brand g:size g:item_group_id g:condition g:shipping_weight adwords_grouping g:country g:custom_label_1 g:color g:material

xsl:when.test: (($unit = 'day' or not($unit)) and $days <= 3) or ($unit = 'hour' and $days <= 72) or ($unit = 'minute' and $days <= 4320)
(($unit = 'day' or not($unit)) and $days > 3) or ($unit = 'hour' and $days > 72) or ($unit = 'minute' and $days > 4320)
